description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building enclosed within a rectangular stone or concrete perimeter wall, featuring a well-maintained green lawn. The structure has a prominent, multi-faceted hip roof in a light gray color, with dark vertical siding on the exterior walls. The front facade includes a raised porch with white balustrades, accessible by a set of stone steps and a paved walkway leading to a double gate. Large windows are present on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is landscaped with small shrubs and planters near the entrance, and the rear of the house is more private with minimal openings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a light gray hip roof, dark vertical siding, a raised front porch, and a surrounding stone wall with a green lawn.
description_view_0: The left-side view shows the main entrance, raised porch with white balustrades, stone steps, and a paved walkway leading to the gate.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the private back of the bungalow with minimal windows and a continuous green lawn within the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: The right-side view displays the side elevation with large windows and the continuation of the stone walkway and lawn.
description_view_3: The front view showcases the symmetrical porch, double gate, white balustrades, and the main entrance flanked by planters.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
